con:part.con:content:
<!--Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more contributor license agreements. See the NOTICE file distributed with this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership. Sveriges Kommuner och Landsting licenses this file to you under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at
http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied. See the License for the specific language governing permissions and limitations under the License.--> <wsdl:definitions name="UpdateListingInteraction" targetNamespace="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:UpdateListing:2:rivtabp21" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tjsr="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:UpdateListingResponder:2" xmlns:tjsi="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:UpdateListingInitiator:2" xmlns:tns="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:UpdateListing:2:rivtabp21" xmlns:itr="urn:riv:itintegration:registry:1"> <wsdl:documentation>Tjänsteinteraktionens namn: UpdateListingInteraction Beskrivning: Meddelande om omlistning till annan region Revisioner: Tjänstedomän: supportprocess:logistics:carelisting Tjänsteinteraktionstyp: Fråga-Svar WS-profil: RIVTABP21 Förvaltas av: Sveriges Kommuner och Landsting</wsdl:documentation> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema targetNamespace="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:UpdateListing:2:rivtabp21"> <xs:import schemaLocation="UpdateListingResponder_2.0.xsd" namespace="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:UpdateListingResponder:2"/> <xs:import schemaLocation="../../core_components/itintegration_registry_1.0.xsd" namespace="urn:riv:itintegration:registry:1"/> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="UpdateListingRequest"> <wsdl:part name="LogicalAddress" element="itr:LogicalAddress"> <wsdl:documentation>The county/region code</wsdl:documentation> </wsdl:part> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tjsr:UpdateListing"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="UpdateListingResponse"> <wsdl:part name="parameters" element="tjsr:UpdateListingResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:portType name="UpdateListingResponderInterface"> <wsdl:operation name="UpdateListing"> <wsdl:input message="tns:UpdateListingRequest"/> <wsdl:output message="tns:UpdateListingResponse"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="UpdateListingResponderBinding" type="tns:UpdateListingResponderInterface"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <wsdl:operation name="UpdateListing"> <soap:operation soapAction="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:UpdateListingResponder:2:UpdateListing" style="document"/> <wsdl:input> <soap:header use="literal" message="tns:UpdateListingRequest" part="LogicalAddress"/> <soap:body use="literal" parts="parameters"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <wsdl:service name="UpdateListingResponderService"> <wsdl:port name="UpdateListingResponderPort" binding="tns:UpdateListingResponderBinding"> <soap:address location="http://tempuri.org"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </wsdl:definitions>

<!--Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more contributor license agreements. See the NOTICE file distributed with this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership. Sveriges Kommuner och Landsting licenses this file to you under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at
http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied. See the License for the specific language governing permissions and limitations under the License.--> <xs:schema targetNamespace="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:UpdateListingResponder:2" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" version="2.0" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:UpdateListingResponder:2" xmlns:core="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:2"> <xs:import schemaLocation="../../core_components/supportprocess_logistics_carelisting_2.0.xsd" namespace="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:2"/> <xs:element name="UpdateListing" type="tns:UpdateListingType"/> <xs:element name="UpdateListingResponse" type="tns:UpdateListingResponseType"/> <xs:complexType name="UpdateListingType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="personId" type="core:IIType"/> <xs:element name="newListingCounty" type="core:IIType"/> <xs:element name="homeCounty" type="core:IIType"/> <xs:element name="listingType" type="core:CVType" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:any namespace="##other" processContents="lax" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="UpdateListingResponseType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="resultCode" type="core:ResultCodeEnum" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:element name="resultText" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> <xs:any namespace="##other" processContents="lax" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>

<!--Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more contributor license agreements. See the NOTICE file distributed with this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership. Sveriges Kommuner och Landsting licenses this file to you under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at
http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied. See the License for the specific language governing permissions and limitations under the License.--> <xs:schema targetNamespace="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:2" elementFormDefault="qualified" attributeFormDefault="unqualified" version="2.0" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:2"> <xs:complexType name="IIType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="root" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="extension" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:any namespace="##other" processContents="lax" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="CVType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation/> </xs:annotation> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="code" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="codeSystem" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="codeSystemName" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="codeSystemVersion" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="displayName" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="originalText" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:any namespace="##other" processContents="lax" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:simpleType name="HSAIdType"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"/> </xs:simpleType> <xs:complexType name="HealthcareFacilityType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Vårdinrättning/vårdenhet som ansvarar för en person som listat sig hos dem. Det är denna inrättning som får ekonomisk ersättning för personen.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="id" type="tns:HSAIdType"/> <xs:element name="name" type="xs:string"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Namn på vårdenheten.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="hasQueue" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element name="supportedListingTypes" type="tns:CVType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Lista med listningstyper som vårdeneheten stödjer. Kan utelämnas om information saknas eller om informationen inte behövs i kontexten där entiteten är tänkt att användas i.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> </xs:element> <xs:element name="supportsHealthcarePersonnel" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:any processContents="lax" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" namespace="##other"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="ListingHealthcareFacilityType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="validFromDate" type="xs:dateTime" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="validToDate" type="xs:dateTime" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="listingType" type="tns:CVType"/> <xs:element name="healthcareFacility" type="tns:HealthcareFacilityType"/> <xs:element name="healthcarePersonnel" type="tns:HealthcarePersonnelType" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="isInQueue" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:any processContents="lax" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" namespace="##other"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="HealthcarePersonnelType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="id" type="tns:HSAIdType"/> <xs:element name="name" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="title" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:any processContents="lax" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" namespace="##other"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:simpleType name="ResultCodeEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="OK"/> <xs:enumeration value="ERROR"/> <xs:enumeration value="INFO"/> <xs:enumeration value="ERROR_MAXIMUM_ANNUAL_UPDATES_EXCEEDED"/> <xs:enumeration value="ERROR_MAXIMUM_CITIZEN_REACHED_ON_CAREUNIT"/> <xs:enumeration value="ERROR_GUARDIAN_CONSENT_NEEDED"/> <xs:enumeration value="ERROR_AGE_LIMIT"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:complexType name="ActorType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="actorId" type="tns:IIType"/> <xs:element name="actorType" type="tns:ActorTypeEnum"/> <xs:any namespace="##other" processContents="lax" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:simpleType name="ActorTypeEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="CITIZEN"/> <xs:enumeration value="GUARDIAN"/> <xs:enumeration value="REGION"/> <xs:enumeration value="PRIVATE_CAREGIVER"/> <xs:enumeration value="SELF_OWNED_CAREGIVER"/> <xs:enumeration value="HEALTHCARE_ADVISER"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> </xs:schema>

<xs:schema targetNamespace="urn:riv:itintegration:registry:1" elementFormDefault="qualified" version="1.0" xmlns="urn:riv:itintegration:registry:1" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Beskrivning: Grundläggande informationsobjekt för domänen itintegration:registry (adressering av tjänster)
Revisionshistorik: 2011-06-27 Mats Ekhammar, Callista Enterprise AB Added ServiceContractType
Datum: 2011-05-04 Beskrivning: Initial version Författare: marcus.krantz@callistaenterprise.se</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:element name="LogicalAddress" type="LogicalAddressType"/> <xs:element name="ServiceContract" type="ServiceContractType"/> <xs:simpleType name="LogicalAddressType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Defines the type for logical address according to national reference architecture. Superseeds wsa:To as type for logical address header in RIVTA 2.1.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"/> </xs:simpleType> <xs:complexType name="ServiceContractType"> <xs:annotation> <xs:documentation>Type which describes a service contract. Used in interaction GetSupportedServiceContracts.</xs:documentation> </xs:annotation> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="ServiceContractNamespace" type="xs:anyURI"/> <xs:any namespace="##other" processContents="lax" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:urn="urn:riv:itintegration:registry:1" xmlns:urn1="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:UpdateListingResponder:2" xmlns:urn2="urn:riv:supportprocess:logistics:carelisting:2">\r <soapenv:Header>\r <urn:LogicalAddress>?</urn:LogicalAddress>\r </soapenv:Header>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <urn1:UpdateListing>\r <urn1:personId>\r <urn2:root>?</urn2:root>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <urn2:extension>?</urn2:extension>\r <!--You may enter ANY elements at this point-->\r </urn1:personId>\r <urn1:newListingCounty>\r <urn2:root>?</urn2:root>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <urn2:extension>?</urn2:extension>\r <!--You may enter ANY elements at this point-->\r </urn1:newListingCounty>\r <urn1:homeCounty>\r <urn2:root>?</urn2:root>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <urn2:extension>?</urn2:extension>\r <!--You may enter ANY elements at this point-->\r </urn1:homeCounty>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <urn1:listingType>\r <urn2:code>?</urn2:code>\r <urn2:codeSystem>?</urn2:codeSystem>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <urn2:codeSystemName>?</urn2:codeSystemName>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <urn2:codeSystemVersion>?</urn2:codeSystemVersion>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <urn2:displayName>?</urn2:displayName>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <urn2:originalText>?</urn2:originalText>\r <!--You may enter ANY elements at this point-->\r </urn1:listingType>\r <!--You may enter ANY elements at this point-->\r </urn1:UpdateListing>\r </soapenv:Body>\r </soapenv:Envelope>

con:configuration.scriptText: assert context.homeCounty != context.logicalAddress : "Set homeCounty different from logicalAddress"
